articles.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs - TechCrunch
articles.description: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.
articles.content: The golden age of Microsoft’s Github Copilot appears to be at an end for the little guy, at least. The company is switching its billing system from a flat subscription rate to a token-usage system th… [+3269 chars]

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful - TechCrunch
articles.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.
articles.content: Gemini Spark is Google’s new 24/7 agentic assistant, designed to help you help you “navigate your digital life,” which essentially means getting your online to-dos done, summarizing the things you do… [+10741 chars]
